positive: A stylized, symmetrical woodland scene featuring abstract silhouettes of glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and fox tails. The composition should be centered and vertically balanced, designed for a clear, high-contrast print on fabric. Use a deep sapphire blue and emerald green palette, accented with pops of electric cyan light. The style should be a minimalist, modern gothic botanical illustration, rendered with crisp lines and solid areas of color. Focus on negative space and clean, sharp edges for optimal apparel transfer. High contrast, graphic novel aesthetic.
